summary: Replayed ADR 0245 from the exact committed 0.177.72 latest-main merge commit by converging the shared API gateway and interactive ops portal on docker-runtime-lv3 under explicit service locks, publishing the declared-to-live service attestation contract through the authenticated gateway surfaces, and re-verifying both the internal portal runtime and the public edges while preserving the current mainline platform baseline.

verification.observed: uv run --with pytest --with fastapi==0.116.1 --with httpx==0.28.1 --with uvicorn==0.35.0 --with pyyaml==6.0.2 --with cryptography==45.0.6 --with jinja2==3.1.5 --with itsdangerous==2.2.0 --with python-multipart==0.0.20 pytest -q tests/test_declared_live_attestation.py tests/test_api_gateway.py tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_windmill_circuit_clients.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py returned 102 passed in 5.48s, python3 -m py_compile platform/runtime_assurance/declared_live_attestation.py scripts/declared_live_attestation.py scripts/api_gateway/main.py scripts/ops_portal/app.py scripts/ops_portal/runtime_assurance.py passed, and make syntax-check-api-gateway plus make syntax-check-ops-portal both passed.

make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-api-gateway and make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-ops-portal passed from the isolated worktree, ./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards passed, uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate passed, uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check passed, and git diff --check passed on the documented 0.177.72 state.

make converge-api-gateway env=production ANSIBLE_TRACE_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true' completed successfully from source commit b7f10ba204e98566e35e7c796918160b0a0a969c while holding resource lock vm:120/service:api_gateway with recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=242 changed=111 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=35 rescued=0 ignored=0.

make converge-ops-portal env=production ANSIBLE_TRACE_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true' completed successfully from source commit b7f10ba204e98566e35e7c796918160b0a0a969c while holding resource lock vm:120/service:ops_portal with recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=131 changed=17 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14 rescued=0 ignored=0.

HEAD https://api.example.com/v1/platform/attestation returned HTTP/2 401 without a bearer token, GET https://api.example.com/healthz returned HTTP/2 200 with {"status":"ok"}, authenticated GET https://api.example.com/v1/platform/attestation returned HTTP/2 200 with a 45-service production summary and api_gateway attested, and authenticated GET https://api.example.com/v1/platform/attestation/api_gateway returned HTTP/2 200 with service_id=api_gateway and status=attested.

verification.check: Ops portal internal and public verification
verification.observed: From docker-runtime-lv3 reached through the current Proxmox jump path, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/health returned HTTP 200 with {"status":"ok"}, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/ returned HTTP 200 with root_len=487865 and still contained Runtime Assurance, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/overview returned HTTP 200 with overview_len=403506 and still contained Runtime Assurance, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/launcher returned HTTP 200 with launcher_len=65756 and still contained Application Launcher, GET https://ops.example.com/health returned HTTP/2 200 with {"status":"ok"}, and HEAD https://ops.example.com/ returned HTTP/2 302 redirecting to /oauth2/sign_in as expected for the protected operator shell.

make validate reported the same unrelated ansible-lint warnings in collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/control_plane_recovery/defaults/main.yml, collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/monitoring_vm/tasks/main.yml, collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/openbao_runtime/defaults/main.yml, and collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/windmill_runtime/{defaults/main.yml,tasks/main.yml}, continued through the downstream idempotency, shell, JSON, compose runtime env guard, retry guard, repository data model, ADR 0230 policy, and architecture fitness steps, and then exited on the expected branch-local workstream surface ownership guard because branch codex/ws-0245-live-apply maps to terminal workstream ws-0245-live-apply.

notes: This receipt supersedes the earlier 0.177.67 candidate evidence and records the replay from the committed 0.177.72 latest-main merge commit after origin/main advanced through the ADR 0274 through ADR 0294 documentation additions.
The verified mainline platform baseline remained 0.130.46 during this replay; the release cut records ADR 0245 in repo truth without claiming a new platform version bump.

The final successful replay held explicit ADR 0153 service locks for vm:120/service:api_gateway and vm:120/service:ops_portal so the shared docker-runtime-lv3 surfaces could converge without cross-workstream interference.
Guest-local portal verification was re-run over the current Proxmox jump path after a stale controller-local port forward stopped reflecting the live container state.
